questions.prompt: Please, let me … when you are coming.
Neither Tom … Claire came to the meeting.
You need to follow the recipe step … step.
The accident has been caused by a driver using a mobile phone.
answers: A driver using a mobile phone has caused the accident

questions.prompt: Is somebody going to order the pizzas in the end?
answers: Are the pizzas going to be ordered in the end

questions.prompt: They sold Anna’s car in just one week.
questions.instruction: Give a question for the underlined words.
answers: Whose car did they sell in just one week

questions.prompt: Detroit is the city. They lived there when they were young.
answers: Detroit is the city where they lived when they were young
Detroit is the city in which they lived when they were young

questions.prompt: I’d rather you didn’t stay long at the party.
answers: You had better not stay long at the party
You'd better not stay long at the party

questions.prompt: Unless Jake finds a proper solution, …

manualCorrection.structure: subject + will / can / may + infinitive // subject + present simple

questions.prompt: Despite of the challenges, we managed completing the project on time.
questions.instruction: Find the mistakes and rewrite the sentence.
answers: Despite the challenges, we managed to complete the project on time

questions.prompt: ‘I must return the car to my father next weekend,’ Paul said.
answers: Paul said that he had to return the car to his father the following weekend
Paul said that he had to return the car to his father the weekend after
